label: general GPU SoC
note: full ONNX op-set, mixed precision, native TopK/ArgMin/Gather — the kNN-vs-bank tail runs end-to-end on-device. The only substrate that ships PatchCore whole.

instances.name: jetson_orin
instances.label: Jetson Orin (TensorRT)
instances.note: peak int8 TOPS not fetched (SKU-dependent); memory/op-fit hold regardless. Runs PatchCore lookup natively — no host tail.
